BatchStopTrainingTasksV2.queueID: The queue to which the training task belongs; for self-managed resource pools, enter the queue name; for managed resource pools, enter the queue ID
BatchStopTrainingTasksV2.resourcePoolId: For self-managed resource pools, pass the unique resource pool identifier (e.g., cce-1uji3ib5); for managed resource pools, pass aihc-serverless
BatchStopTrainingTasksV2.jobList: Array of task ID list, where each element is an object containing a jobId
BatchStopTrainingTasksV2.jobList[].jobId: Unique identifier of a single task; must be non-empty and unique
